product_overview: A comprehensive multi-language (Arabic-first) online platform for cinematic equipment and studio rentals based in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia. It supports equipment, studio, and package rentals with a robust booking engine including state machine workflow, financial integrations, AI-powered recommendations, and a full admin dashboard with granular role-based access control.
core_goals: Enable browsing and rental of cinema equipment and studios with comprehensive details and availability.
Implement a smart booking system with state machine handling, risk scoring, and payment integration.
Provide an admin and client portal with multilingual support and role-based access control.
Support financial management including invoicing, payments, refunds, and ZATCA tax compliance.
Integrate AI features for kit building, pricing suggestions, demand forecasting, and smart search.
Ensure system security with audit logging, approval workflows, and fine-grained permissions.
Facilitate warehouse operations and delivery with tracking and damage reporting.
Allow marketing campaigns, coupon management, and notifications.
Support extensibility with feature toggles, integration layers, and future mobile app.
Maintain high performance and accessibility with RTL support and responsive design.
key_features: Multi-language support (Arabic, English, Chinese) with Arabic-first RTL UI and professional design system.
Equipment, studio, and package rentals with detailed CRUD, availability, and condition lifecycle.
Advanced booking state machine with 8 states, transitions, risk check, soft locks, and approval workflows.
AI-powered tools: risk scoring, deposit calculation, equipment suggestion, pricing optimization, demand prediction.
Comprehensive admin dashboard with sidebar navigation, permission-based controls and audit trail.
Full financial management including invoice generation, VAT calculation, payment processing with Tap gateway, refund workflows, and ZATCA compliance.
Client portal for self-service booking, contract signing with e-signature placeholders.
Warehouse and delivery management with scan-based check-in/out, packing lists, driver assignment, and delivery states.
Marketing and coupon management with campaign tracking and multi-channel notifications (email, WhatsApp, SMS).
File upload components for IDs and documentation with progress indicator.
Robust API layer with validation, authorization policies, event-driven notifications, and error handling.
user_flow_summary: Create Booking Flow: Staff or admin selects client, chooses equipment/studio/packages, picks dates, delivery options, reviews pricing, submits booking triggering risk check.
Booking State Transitions: Bookings move through draft, risk check, payment pending, confirmed, active, returned, closed, or cancelled with relevant conditions and permissions.
Warehouse Checkout Flow: Warehouse team scans booking, verifies items and condition, generates packing list, confirms check-out transitioning booking to active.
Client Portal Booking Flow: Client browses equipment, adds to cart, logs in, completes KYC, pays deposit, signs contract electronically, and views booking confirmation.
AI Kit Builder Flow: Staff/admin inputs project requirements, AI generates equipment suggestions, reviews, modifies, and adds to booking.
Invoice Generation Flow: Admin selects booking, calculates charges, taxes, reviews invoice, submits to ZATCA, and sends to client.
Maintenance Scheduling Flow: Admin schedules maintenance by equipment and type, assigns technician, and technician completes with logging.
validation_criteria: All API routes implement Zod validation schemas and return standardized JSON responses.
Role-based permission enforcement with policy checks on all sensitive operations.
Booking state machine enforces valid transitions with required conditions and actions.
Multi-language UI components support Arabic RTL and English LTR with accessible keyboard navigation and ARIA labels.
AI results are always logged with reasoning and human override capability.
Financial operations require mandatory admin approvals and audit trails.
File uploads enforce accepted file types and size limits with progress indicators.
System supports feature toggles with emergency modes like Maintenance and Read-Only.
All admin and client UI components are responsive, keyboard accessible, and tested in Arabic and English.
Comprehensive audit logging and event-driven notifications trigger on all critical state changes and financial transactions.

features.name: Authentication
features.description: NextAuth.js signin, signout, session. Auth via /api/auth/*.

features.name: Bookings
features.description: CRUD and status transitions for equipment rental bookings.

features.name: Invoices
features.description: Generate and manage invoices for bookings.

features.name: Reports Dashboard
features.description: Dashboard statistics and reports for admin.
